TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Dinkam, title = Dinkam, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dinkam} }

S.FORM: alang Tanguhla/Dinkam ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 42 buwan, 147 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 145 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 2 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 82%, Rukay 1%, Tayan 1%, Cou 9%, Hla'aluwa 4%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. tay 'llaw na Dinkam hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Dinkam hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Dinkam hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Dinkam hya' ga rgyax krahu'.

alang Tanguhla/Dinkam ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 42 buwan, 147 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 145 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 2 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 82%, Rukay 1%, Tayan 1%, Cou 9%, Hla'aluwa 4%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. tay 'llaw na Dinkam hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Dinkam hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Dinkam hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Dinkam hya' ga rgyax krahu'.
S.PHON: alaŋ taŋuħla/*inkam ɣa nija mki s~ɕku takaw s~ɕi atu toweŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, rukaj *%, tajan *%, ʦ~ʨou *%, ħlaʔaluwa *%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. taj ʔllaw na *inkam ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na *inkam ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na *inkam ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na *inkam ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ.
